codeReview.summary: The run-state-machine module enforces the intended transition graph, records start/end timestamps on state changes, and provides an idempotent callback-settlement path that ignores duplicate or late terminal callbacks on cancelled runs. I did not find a correctness issue in this feature.

summary: Reviewed the handoff, transcript skeleton, and commit `f31e601911aed7c2ba6a2438a6b9b13608d77d25` for `run-state-machine`. The transition and settlement logic matches the intended run lifecycle and I found no code defects in this feature.
